In [2]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import scipy.stats as stats
from scipy.stats import chi2_contingency
In [3]:

In [5]:
# Konversi ke kategorik
df["Gender"] = df["Gender"].map({0: "Male", 1: "Female"}).astype("category")

df["EducationLevel"] = df["EducationLevel"].map({
    1: "High School",
    2: "Diploma/Bachelor",
    3: "Magister",
    4: "PhD"
}).astype("category")

df["RecruitmentStrategy"] = df["RecruitmentStrategy"].map({
    1: "Internal",
    2: "External",
    3: "Referral"
}).astype("category")

df["HiringDecision"] = df["HiringDecision"].map({0: "Not Hired", 1: "Hired"}).astype("category")

Feature Engineering¶

In [12]:
def experience_category(years):
    if years < 2:
        return 'Junior'
    elif 2 <= years <= 5:
        return 'Medior'
    else:
        return 'Senior'

df['ExperienceLevel'] = df['ExperienceYears'].apply(experience_category)
# df['TotalScore'] = (df['SkillScore'] + df['PersonalityScore'] + df['InterviewScore']) / 3
# df['Resident_Type'] = np.where(df['DistanceFromCompany'] < 25, "Is-Local", "Non-Local")
# df['Professional_Maturity'] = df['Age'] + df['ExperienceYears']

Univariate Analysis¶

In [14]:
nums= df.select_dtypes(include=['int64','float64']).columns
for col in nums:
    Q1 = df[col].quantile(0.25)
    Q3 = df[col].quantile(0.75)
    IQR = Q3 - Q1
    lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
    upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
    outliers = df[(df[col] < lower_bound) | (df[col] > upper_bound)]

    print(f"{col}: {outliers.shape[0]} outliers")

Age: 0 outliers
ExperienceYears: 0 outliers
PreviousCompanies: 0 outliers
DistanceFromCompany: 0 outliers
InterviewScore: 0 outliers
SkillScore: 0 outliers
PersonalityScore: 0 outliers
In [15]:
nums= df.select_dtypes(include=['int64','float64']).columns
n_cols = 3
n_rows = (len(nums) + n_cols - 1) // n_cols

fig, axis = plt.subplots(nrows=n_rows, ncols=n_cols, figsize=(8, 5))
axis = axis.flatten()

for i, col in enumerate(nums):
    sns.boxplot(x=df[col], ax=axis[i])

# Hide any unused subplots
for j in range(len(nums), len(axis)):
    axis[j].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [16]:
num_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64','float64']).columns
custom_palette = ["#24b1b7", "#4c5f70"]
cols =4  # jumlah kolom subplot
rows = (len(num_cols) // cols) + (len(num_cols) % cols > 0)

fig, axis = plt.subplots(rows, cols, figsize=(17,10))
axis = axis.flatten()

for i, col in enumerate(num_cols):
    sns.kdeplot(df[col], fill=True, ax=axis[i],)
    axis[i].set_title(f"{col} distribution")

# Matikan subplot kosong
for j in range(len(num_cols), len(axis)):
    axis[j].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [17]:
cat_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['category', 'object']).columns
education_order = ["High School", "Diploma/Bachelor", "Magister", "PhD"]
cols = 2
rows = (len(cat_cols) // cols) + (len(cat_cols) % cols > 0)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(rows, cols, figsize=(12, rows*4))
axes = axes.flatten()
# Define a broader set of colors, and slice as needed
all_possible_colors = ["#3E5F77", "#00CED1", "#42E0E2", "#5EFAFD", "#FF6F61", "#6B5B95", "#88B04B", "#F7CAC9"]

for i, col in enumerate(cat_cols):
    ax = axes[i]
    current_order = education_order if col == "EducationLevel" else df[col].value_counts().index

    # Calculate percentages for plotting
    percentage_data = df[col].value_counts(normalize=True).mul(100).rename('percentage').reset_index()
    percentage_data.columns = [col, 'percentage'] # Rename columns for clarity

    sns.barplot(
        x=col,
        y='percentage',
        data=percentage_data,
        ax=ax,
        hue=col, # Added hue=col to address the FutureWarning
        palette='coolwarm',
        legend=False,
        order=current_order
    )

    ax.set_title(f"{col} Distribution (Percentage)")
    ax.set_xlabel(col)
    ax.set_ylabel("Percentage") # Set y-axis label to 'Percentage'
    ax.set_ylim(0, 100) # Ensure y-axis goes up to 100%

    # Tambahkan persentase di atas bar
    for p in ax.patches:
        height = p.get_height()
        if height > 0:
            ax.text(
                p.get_x() + p.get_width() / 2,  # posisi tengah bar
                height,                 # posisi atas bar (which is now the percentage)
                f"{height:.1f}%", # Format height directly as percentage
                ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, color='black'
            )

# Matikan subplot kosong
for j in range(len(cat_cols), len(axes)):
    axes[j].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [18]:
# Set tema visualisasi
sns.set_theme(style="white")
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 6))

# List kolom yang ingin dibandingkan
score_cols = ['InterviewScore', 'SkillScore', 'PersonalityScore']

for i, col in enumerate(score_cols):
    sns.boxplot(data=df, x='HiringDecision', y=col, ax=axes[i], palette='coolwarm', hue='HiringDecision', legend=False)
    axes[i].set_title(f'{col} by HiringDecision')
    axes[i].set_xlabel('Hiring Decision')
    axes[i].set_ylabel(col)
    axes[i].set_xticks([0, 1], ['Not Hired', 'Hired'])

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [19]:
target = "HiringDecision"
custom_colors = ["#24b1b7", "#4c5f70"]

for col in cat_cols:
    plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))

    proportions_df = df.groupby(col, observed=True)[target].value_counts(normalize=True).mul(100).rename('Percentage').reset_index()

    # Logika untuk menentukan urutan
    current_order = education_order if col == 'EducationLevel' else None

    # Tambahkan parameter order
    ax = sns.barplot(data=proportions_df, x=col, y='Percentage', hue=target, palette='coolwarm', order=current_order)

    ax.set_title(f"Hiring Rate By {col}\n")
    ax.set_xlabel(col)
    ax.set_ylabel("Percentage")
    ax.set_ylim(0, 100)

    # Loop label persentase tetap sama...
    for p in ax.patches:
        height = p.get_height()
        if height > 0:
            ax.text(p.get_x() + p.get_width() / 2., height + 2, f"{height:.1f}%",
                    ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, color='black')

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
In [20]:
,# Validate plot percentage
female_hired_count = df[(df['Gender'] == 'Female') & (df['HiringDecision'] == 'Hired')].shape[0]
total_females = df[df['Gender'] == 'Female'].shape[0]

if total_females > 0:
    percentage_female_hired = (female_hired_count / total_females) * 100
    print(f"Percentage of females with a hiring decision of 'Hired' (1): {percentage_female_hired:.2f}%")
else:
    print("No female candidates found in the dataset.")

Percentage of females with a hiring decision of 'Hired' (1): 30.89%

Multivariate Analysis¶

In [21]:
# Pastikan HiringDecision_num sudah dibuat dan bertipe integer
df['HiringDecision'] = df['HiringDecision'].map({'Hired': 1, 'Not Hired': 0}).astype('Int64')

# Add HiringDecision_num to df so it's included in correlation
df['HiringDecision'] = df['HiringDecision']

numerical_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64','float64']).columns
# Hitung korelasi
corr = df[numerical_cols].corr()

# Buat mask untuk segitiga atas
mask = np.triu(np.ones_like(corr, dtype=bool))

# Plot heatmap
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))
sns.heatmap(corr, mask=mask, annot=True, fmt=".3f",
            cmap="coolwarm", center=0, linewidths=0.5,
            cbar_kws={"shrink": 0.8})

plt.title("Correlation Heatmap Numerical Features", fontsize=14)
plt.show()
In [22]:
# Chi-Square Test - kategorik
chi2_results = []

# Ensure ExperienceLevel is category type for selection
df['ExperienceLevel'] = df['ExperienceLevel'].astype('category')

# Get all categorical columns for testing (HiringDecision is Int64, so it won't be here)
cat_features_to_test = df.select_dtypes(include=['category']).columns

# The target variable is df["HiringDecision"], which is now Int64 (0/1).
# pd.crosstab will treat these as categories.

for col in cat_features_to_test:
    contingency = pd.crosstab(df[col], df["HiringDecision"])
    chi2, p, dof, _ = stats.chi2_contingency(contingency)
    chi2_results.append([col, chi2, p, dof])

chi2_df = pd.DataFrame(chi2_results, columns=["Feature", "Chi2", "p-value", "dof"])
chi2_df["Significance"] = chi2_df["p-value"].apply(lambda x: "Significant" if x < 0.05 else "Not Significant")
chi2_df = chi2_df.round({"Chi2": 3, "p-value": 4})

display(chi2_df)
Feature Chi2 p-value dof Significance
0 Gender 0.001 0.9751 1 Not Significant
1 EducationLevel 103.675 0.0000 3 Significant
2 RecruitmentStrategy 489.681 0.0000 2 Significant
3 ExperienceLevel 39.198 0.0000 2 Significant
In [23]:
# ANOVA Test - numerik
anova_results = []
numerical_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64','float64']).columns.drop('HiringDecision')

for col in numerical_cols:
    groups = [group[col].values for _, group in df.groupby("HiringDecision", observed=True)]
    # Check if any group has constant input (zero variance)
    if any(len(set(g)) < 2 for g in groups):
        print(f"Skipping ANOVA for '{col}' due to constant input in one or more groups.")
        continue

    f_stat, p = stats.f_oneway(*groups)
    anova_results.append([col, f_stat, p])

anova_df = pd.DataFrame(anova_results, columns=["Feature", "F-stat", "p-value"])
anova_df["Significance"] = anova_df["p-value"].apply(lambda x: "Significant" if x < 0.01 else "Not Significant")

anova_df = anova_df.round({"F-stat": 3, "p-value": 4})

display(anova_df)
Feature F-stat p-value Significance
0 Age 0.005 0.9429 Not Significant
1 ExperienceYears 22.819 0.0000 Significant
2 PreviousCompanies 2.909 0.0883 Not Significant
3 DistanceFromCompany 0.422 0.5158 Not Significant
4 InterviewScore 32.656 0.0000 Significant
5 SkillScore 64.827 0.0000 Significant
6 PersonalityScore 44.137 0.0000 Significant

In [28]:
# 1. Mapping yang rapi
edu_mapping = {
    'High School': 1,
    'Diploma/Bachelor': 2,
    'Magister': 3,
    'PhD': 4
}

# 2. Bersihkan spasi, samakan huruf, dan mapping
# Gunakan X['EducationLevel'] asli (pastikan X didefinisikan ulang dari dataframe awal jika perlu)
X['EducationLevel'] = X['EducationLevel'].astype(str).str.strip().map(edu_mapping)

# 3. Ubah ke integer (gunakan 'Int64' agar aman jika memang ada yang benar-benar kosong)
X['EducationLevel'] = X['EducationLevel'].astype(int)

# Cek 5 data teratas
print(X['EducationLevel'].head())

0    2
1    4
2    2
3    2
4    1
Name: EducationLevel, dtype: int64

Modeling¶

In [40]:
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsClassifier
from xgboost import XGBClassifier
In [41]:
model_lr = LogisticRegression(random_state=42)
model_dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(random_state=42)
model_rf = RandomForestClassifier(random_state=42)
model_knn = KNeighborsClassifier()
model_xgb = XGBClassifier(random_state=42)
In [42]:
model_lr.fit(X_train, y_train)
model_dt.fit(X_train, y_train)
model_rf.fit(X_train, y_train)
model_knn.fit(X_train, y_train)
model_xgb.fit(X_train, y_train)

In [43]:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score

# List model yang ingin dibandingkan
models = [
    ('Logistic Regression', model_lr),
    ('Decision Tree', model_dt),
    ('Random Forest', model_rf),
    ('K-Neighbors', model_knn),
    ('XGBoost', model_xgb)
]
In [44]:
summary_list = []

for name, model in models:
    # Prediksi
    y_pred = model.predict(X_test)

    # Ambil probabilitas untuk ROC-AUC (jika tersedia)
    if hasattr(model, "predict_proba"):
        y_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]
        roc_auc = roc_auc_score(y_test, y_proba)
    else:
        roc_auc = "N/A" # Beberapa model mungkin tidak punya predict_proba

    # Simpan hasil ke dictionary
    summary_list.append({
        'Algorithm': name,
        'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'Precision': precision_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'Recall': recall_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'F1-Score': f1_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'ROC-AUC': roc_auc
    })

# Ubah menjadi DataFrame agar rapi
df_comparison = pd.DataFrame(summary_list)
display(df_comparison.sort_values(by='F1-Score', ascending=False).round(3))
Algorithm Accuracy Precision Recall F1-Score ROC-AUC
2 Random Forest 0.898 0.843 0.791 0.816 0.910
4 XGBoost 0.882 0.797 0.791 0.794 0.899
0 Logistic Regression 0.862 0.853 0.628 0.723 0.886
1 Decision Tree 0.809 0.635 0.783 0.701 0.801
3 K-Neighbors 0.613 0.381 0.558 0.453 0.625
In [45]:
summary_list = []

for name, model in models:
    # --- Prediksi Label & Probabilitas ---
    y_train_pred = model.predict(X_train)
    y_test_pred = model.predict(X_test)

    # Ambil probabilitas untuk ROC-AUC
    y_train_proba = model.predict_proba(X_train)[:, 1]
    y_test_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

    # --- Hitung Metrik (Termasuk ROC-AUC) ---
    acc_train = accuracy_score(y_train, y_train_pred)
    acc_test = accuracy_score(y_test, y_test_pred)
    precision_train = precision_score(y_train, y_train_pred)
    precision_test = precision_score(y_test, y_test_pred)
    recall_train = recall_score(y_train, y_train_pred)
    recall_test = recall_score(y_test, y_test_pred)
    f1_train = f1_score(y_train, y_train_pred)
    f1_test = f1_score(y_test, y_test_pred)

    # Di sini variabel roc_auc didefinisikan agar tidak NameError
    roc_auc_train = roc_auc_score(y_train, y_train_proba)
    roc_auc_test = roc_auc_score(y_test, y_test_proba)

    # --- Simpan ke Dictionary ---
    summary_list.append({
        'Algorithm': name,
        'Acc Train': acc_train,
        'Acc Test': acc_test,
        'Precision Train': precision_train,
        'Precision Test': precision_test,
        'Recall Train': recall_train,
        'Recall Test': recall_test,
        'F1 Train': f1_train,
        'F1 Test': f1_test,
        'ROC-AUC Train': roc_auc_train, # Beri nama yang berbeda agar tidak tertimpa
        'ROC-AUC Test': roc_auc_test
    })

# Ubah menjadi DataFrame
df_compare = pd.DataFrame(summary_list)
display(df_compare.sort_values(by='F1 Test', ascending=False).round(3))
Algorithm Acc Train Acc Test Precision Train Precision Test Recall Train Recall Test F1 Train F1 Test ROC-AUC Train ROC-AUC Test
2 Random Forest 1.000 0.898 1.000 0.843 1.000 0.791 1.000 0.816 1.000 0.910
4 XGBoost 1.000 0.882 1.000 0.797 1.000 0.791 1.000 0.794 1.000 0.899
0 Logistic Regression 0.903 0.862 0.903 0.853 0.903 0.628 0.903 0.723 0.955 0.886
1 Decision Tree 1.000 0.809 1.000 0.635 1.000 0.783 1.000 0.701 1.000 0.801
3 K-Neighbors 0.809 0.613 0.770 0.381 0.881 0.558 0.822 0.453 0.913 0.625
In [46]:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score

def calculate_gap(model, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test, model_name):
    # Prediksi Train
    y_train_pred = model.predict(X_train)
    y_train_proba = model.predict_proba(X_train)[:, 1] if hasattr(model, "predict_proba") else None

    # Prediksi Test
    y_test_pred = model.predict(X_test)
    y_test_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1] if hasattr(model, "predict_proba") else None

    # Hitung Metrik & Gap (dalam persen)
    res = {
        'Model': model_name,
        'Accuracy Gap (%)': (accuracy_score(y_train, y_train_pred) - accuracy_score(y_test, y_test_pred)) * 100,
        'Precision Gap (%)': (precision_score(y_train, y_train_pred) - precision_score(y_test, y_test_pred)) * 100,
        'Recall Gap (%)': (recall_score(y_train, y_train_pred) - recall_score(y_test, y_test_pred)) * 100,
        'F1-Score Gap (%)': (f1_score(y_train, y_train_pred) - f1_score(y_test, y_test_pred)) * 100
    }

    # Tambahkan ROC-AUC Gap jika ada probabilitas
    if y_train_proba is not None and y_test_proba is not None:
        res['ROC-AUC Gap (%)'] = (roc_auc_score(y_train, y_train_proba) - roc_auc_score(y_test, y_test_proba)) * 100
    else:
        res['ROC-AUC Gap (%)'] = 0

    return res
In [47]:
# List model yang sudah kamu latih (fit) sebelumnya
all_models = [
    (model_lr, 'Logistic Regression'),
    (model_dt, 'Decision Tree'),
    (model_rf, 'Random Forest'),
    (model_knn, 'K-Neighbors'),
    (model_xgb, 'XGBoost')
]

# List untuk menampung hasil
gap_results = []

for model_obj, name in all_models:
    gap_data = calculate_gap(model_obj, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test, name)
    gap_results.append(gap_data)

# Ubah menjadi DataFrame
df_gap = pd.DataFrame(gap_results)

# Membulatkan hasil angka agar rapi (3 angka di belakang koma)
df_gap = df_gap.round(3)

# Tampilkan Tabel
display(df_gap)
Model Accuracy Gap (%) Precision Gap (%) Recall Gap (%) F1-Score Gap (%) ROC-AUC Gap (%)
0 Logistic Regression 4.114 5.073 27.545 18.015 6.914
1 Decision Tree 19.111 36.478 21.705 29.861 19.887
2 Random Forest 10.222 15.702 20.930 18.400 8.969
3 K-Neighbors 19.549 38.894 32.281 36.885 28.845
4 XGBoost 11.778 20.312 20.930 20.623 10.131

hyperparameter¶

Logistic Regression¶

In [48]:
from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV
model_lr = LogisticRegression(random_state=42)
param_space = {
    'C': [0.001, 0.01, 0.1],
    'penalty': ['l2'],
    'solver': ['lbfgs', 'liblinear']
    }

random_search_lr = RandomizedSearchCV(model_lr, param_space, n_iter=4, cv=5, n_jobs=-1, scoring= 'f1', random_state=42)
random_search_lr.fit(X_train, y_train)
Out[48]:
RandomizedSearchCV(cv=5, estimator=LogisticRegression(random_state=42),
                   n_iter=4, n_jobs=-1,
                   param_distributions={'C': [0.001, 0.01, 0.1],
                                        'penalty': ['l2'],
                                        'solver': ['lbfgs', 'liblinear']},
                   random_state=42, scoring='f1')
In a Jupyter environment, please rerun this cell to show the HTML representation or trust the notebook.
On GitHub, the HTML representation is unable to render, please try loading this page with nbviewer.org.
RandomizedSearchCV(cv=5, estimator=LogisticRegression(random_state=42),
                   n_iter=4, n_jobs=-1,
                   param_distributions={'C': [0.001, 0.01, 0.1],
                                        'penalty': ['l2'],
                                        'solver': ['lbfgs', 'liblinear']},
                   random_state=42, scoring='f1')
LogisticRegression(C=0.1, random_state=42, solver='liblinear')
LogisticRegression(C=0.1, random_state=42, solver='liblinear')
In [49]:
import pandas as pd

# 1. Ambil dictionary parameter terbaik dari hasil random_search
best_params_lr = random_search_lr.best_params_

# 2. Ubah menjadi DataFrame agar rapi seperti tabel
df_best_hyperparameters = pd.DataFrame(list(best_params_lr.items()), columns=['Best Hyperparameter', 'Value'])

# 3. Tampilkan tabelnya
print("=== Tabel Best Hyperparameters K-Neighbors ===")
display(df_best_hyperparameters)

=== Tabel Best Hyperparameters K-Neighbors ===
Best Hyperparameter Value
0 solver liblinear
1 penalty l2
2 C 0.1

Decision Tree¶

In [50]:
from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV
model_dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(random_state=42)
param_space = {
    'criterion': ['gini', 'entropy'],
    'max_depth': [3, 5, 10, 15],
    'min_samples_split': [2, 5, 10, 20],
    'min_samples_leaf': [10, 20, 50]
  }

random_search_dt = RandomizedSearchCV(model_dt, param_space, n_iter=4, cv=5, n_jobs=-1, scoring= 'f1', random_state=42)
random_search_dt.fit(X_train, y_train)
Out[50]:

Random Forest¶

In [52]:
from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV
model_rf = RandomForestClassifier(random_state=42)
param_space = {
    'n_estimators': [100],
    'max_depth': [5],
    'min_samples_split': [2, 5, 10],
    'min_samples_leaf': [10],
    'criterion': ['gini', 'entropy']
    }

random_search_rf = RandomizedSearchCV(model_rf, param_space, n_iter=4, cv=5, n_jobs=-1, scoring= 'f1', random_state=42)
random_search_rf.fit(X_train, y_train)

K-Neighbors¶

In [54]:
from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV
model_knn = KNeighborsClassifier()
param_space = {
    'n_neighbors': [5, 10, 15, 20, 30],
    'weights': ['uniform', 'distance'],
    'p': [1, 2] # 1: Manhattan, 2: Euclidean
    }

random_search_knn = RandomizedSearchCV(model_knn, param_space, n_iter=4, cv=5, n_jobs=-1, scoring= 'f1', random_state=42)
random_search_knn.fit(X_train, y_train)
Out[54]:

XGBoost¶

In [56]:
from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV
model_xgb = XGBClassifier(random_state=42)
param_space = {
    'n_estimators': [100, 200, 300],
    'learning_rate': [0.01, 0.05, 0.1],
    'max_depth': [5, 6, 7],
    'gamma': [0, 0.1, 0.2],
    'reg_lambda': [10, 50, 100]}

random_search_xgb = RandomizedSearchCV(model_xgb, param_space, n_iter=4, cv=5, n_jobs=-1, scoring= 'f1', random_state=42)
random_search_xgb.fit(X_train, y_train)

Hasil Setelah Hyperparameter Tuning¶

In [58]:
tuned_models_list = [
    ('Logistic Regression', random_search_lr.best_estimator_),
    ('K-Neighbors', random_search_knn.best_estimator_),
    ('Decision Tree', random_search_dt.best_estimator_),
    ('Random Forest', random_search_rf.best_estimator_),
    ('XGBoost', random_search_xgb.best_estimator_)
]
In [59]:
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score
import pandas as pd

final_results = []

for name, model in tuned_models_list:
    # Prediksi menggunakan data test
    y_pred = model.predict(X_test)

    # Ambil probabilitas untuk ROC-AUC
    if hasattr(model, "predict_proba"):
        y_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]
        roc_auc = roc_auc_score(y_test, y_proba)
    else:
        roc_auc = "N/A"

    # Simpan hasil ke dictionary
    final_results.append({
        'Algorithm': name,
        'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'Precision': precision_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'Recall': recall_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'F1-Score': f1_score(y_test, y_pred),
        'ROC-AUC': roc_auc
    })

# Tampilkan tabel final
df_final_comparison = pd.DataFrame(final_results)
print("=== PERBANDINGAN FINAL SETELAH HYPERPARAMETER TUNING ===")
display(df_final_comparison.sort_values(by='F1-Score', ascending=False).round(3))

=== PERBANDINGAN FINAL SETELAH HYPERPARAMETER TUNING ===
Algorithm Accuracy Precision Recall F1-Score ROC-AUC
4 XGBoost 0.913 0.857 0.837 0.847 0.913
3 Random Forest 0.873 0.765 0.806 0.785 0.894
2 Decision Tree 0.864 0.739 0.814 0.775 0.889
0 Logistic Regression 0.778 0.574 0.868 0.691 0.881
1 K-Neighbors 0.636 0.407 0.597 0.484 0.653
In [60]:
import pandas as pd

# List model yang sudah di-tuning (sama seperti variabel kamu)
models_to_evaluate = [
    ('Random Forest', random_search_rf.best_estimator_),
    ('Logistic Regression', random_search_lr.best_estimator_),
    ('Decision Tree', random_search_dt.best_estimator_),
    ('K-Neighbors', random_search_knn.best_estimator_),
    ('XGBoost', random_search_xgb.best_estimator_)
]

final_report = []
dataset_order = ['Train', 'Test', 'Gap (%)']

for name, model in models_to_evaluate:
    # Prediksi
    y_train_pred = model.predict(X_train)
    y_test_pred = model.predict(X_test)
    y_train_proba = model.predict_proba(X_train)[:, 1]
    y_test_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

    # Hitung metrik
    data = {
        'Accuracy': [accuracy_score(y_train, y_train_pred), accuracy_score(y_test, y_test_pred)],
        'Precision': [precision_score(y_train, y_train_pred), precision_score(y_test, y_test_pred)],
        'Recall': [recall_score(y_train, y_train_pred), recall_score(y_test, y_test_pred)],
        'F1-Score': [f1_score(y_train, y_train_pred), f1_score(y_test, y_test_pred)],
        'ROC-AUC': [roc_auc_score(y_train, y_train_proba), roc_auc_score(y_test, y_test_proba)]
    }

    df_model = pd.DataFrame(data, index=['Train', 'Test'])
    df_model.loc['Gap (%)'] = (df_model.loc['Train'] - df_model.loc['Test']) * 100
    df_model.insert(0, 'Model', name)
    df_model = df_model.reset_index().rename(columns={'index': 'Dataset'})
    final_report.append(df_model)

# 2. Gabungkan hasil
df_final_report = pd.concat(final_report, ignore_index=True)

# 3. Urutkan berdasarkan F1-Score pada baris 'Test' (Paling tinggi di atas)
# Kita buat tabel bantu untuk sortir
df_sort = df_final_report[df_final_report['Dataset'] == 'Test'].sort_values(by='F1-Score', ascending=False)
ordered_models = df_sort['Model'].tolist()

# Terapkan urutan tersebut ke tabel utama
df_final_report['Dataset'] = pd.Categorical(
    df_final_report['Dataset'],
    categories=dataset_order,
    ordered=True
)

# 3. Urutkan berdasarkan Model dan Dataset (urutan custom tadi)
df_final_report = df_final_report.sort_values(['Model', 'Dataset'])

# Tampilkan dengan pembulatan 3 angka
display(df_final_report.round(3))
Dataset Model Accuracy Precision Recall F1-Score ROC-AUC

7 Test Decision Tree 0.864 0.739 0.814 0.775 0.889

1 Test Random Forest 0.873 0.765 0.806 0.785 0.894
2 Gap (%) Random Forest 4.754 16.643 10.276 13.501 7.106

13 Test XGBoost 0.913 0.857 0.837 0.847 0.913

In [61]:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, roc_auc_score

def create_styled_comparison(model, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test):
    # 1. Prediksi (Gunakan model yang sudah di-fit dengan random_state=42)
    y_train_pred = model.predict(X_train)
    y_test_pred = model.predict(X_test)

    # Probabilitas untuk ROC-AUC
    y_train_proba = model.predict_proba(X_train)[:, 1]
    y_test_proba = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

    # 2. Hitung Metrik Train
    metrics_train = {
        'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_train, y_train_pred),
        'Precision': precision_score(y_train, y_train_pred),
        'Recall': recall_score(y_train, y_train_pred),
        'F1-Score': f1_score(y_train, y_train_pred),
        'ROC-AUC': roc_auc_score(y_train, y_train_proba)
    }

    # 3. Hitung Metrik Test
    metrics_test = {
        'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, y_test_pred),
        'Precision': precision_score(y_test, y_test_pred),
        'Recall': recall_score(y_test, y_test_pred),
        'F1-Score': f1_score(y_test, y_test_pred),
        'ROC-AUC': roc_auc_score(y_test, y_test_proba)
    }

    # 4. Gabungkan ke DataFrame
    df = pd.DataFrame([metrics_train, metrics_test], index=['Train', 'Test'])

    # 5. Tambahkan Baris Gap (%)
    # Rumus: (Train - Test) * 100
    df.loc['Gap (%)'] = (df.loc['Train'] - df.loc['Test']) * 100

    return df.round(3)

# Contoh eksekusi untuk salah satu model hasil tuning kamu
# Pastikan saat inisialisasi model/search sebelumnya sudah pakai random_state=42
# Contoh: RandomForestClassifier(random_state=42)
print("=== TABEL EVALUASI MODEL ===")
display(create_styled_comparison(random_search_xgb.best_estimator_, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test))

=== TABEL EVALUASI MODEL ===
Accuracy Precision Recall F1-Score ROC-AUC
Train 0.976 0.986 0.966 0.976 0.991
Test 0.913 0.857 0.837 0.847 0.913
Gap (%) 6.286 12.857 12.918 12.890 7.835

Confusion Matrix¶

In [62]:
from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, ConfusionMatrixDisplay
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.colors import LinearSegmentedColormap

colors = ["#ffffff", "#ebb7a2", "#d98b72"]
cmap_peach = LinearSegmentedColormap.from_list("custom_peach", colors)

# 1. Ambil nama dan model terbaik (urutan pertama setelah disortir tadi)
# Karena df_final_comparison disortir berdasarkan F1-Score,
# kita ambil index dari model XGBoost yang ada di posisi teratas.
best_model_tuple = tuned_models_list[4] # Index 4 sesuai dengan urutan di tabel Anda
best_model_name = best_model_tuple[0]
best_model_obj = best_model_tuple[1]

# 2. Lakukan prediksi menggunakan X_test
y_pred_best = best_model_obj.predict(X_test)

# 3. Buat Confusion Matrix
cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred_best)

# 4. Visualisasi
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
disp = ConfusionMatrixDisplay(confusion_matrix=cm, display_labels=['Not Hired', 'Hired'])
disp.plot(cmap=cmap_peach, values_format='d')

plt.title(f'Confusion Matrix - {best_model_name}')
plt.show()

<Figure size 800x600 with 0 Axes>

In [64]:
import pandas as pd

# 1. Pilih kolom kategori (Pastikan namanya persis dengan di dataset asli kamu)
cat_cols = ['RecruitmentStrategy', 'EducationLevel', 'ExperienceLevel']

# 2. Ambil data asli (df) tapi filter hanya yang ada di index X_test
# Ini cara paling aman agar kolomnya masih utuh/asli tapi datanya tetap data Test
df_test_cat = df.loc[X_test.index].copy()

summary_cat = []

for col in cat_cols:
    # 3. Groupby berdasarkan kategori
    # Pastikan 'HiringDecision' adalah nama kolom targetmu
    analysis = df_test_cat.groupby(col)['HiringDecision'].agg(['count', 'sum']).reset_index()

    # 4. Rapikan kolom agar sesuai template
    analysis.columns = ['Subset', 'count', 'positives']
    analysis['positive_rate'] = (analysis['positives'] / analysis['count']).round(3)
    analysis.insert(0, 'Feature', col)

    summary_cat.append(analysis)

# 5. Gabungkan semua
df_final_cat = pd.concat(summary_cat, ignore_index=True)
display(df_final_cat)

In [65]:
# 1. Gabungkan fitur test dan target test untuk dianalisis
numeric_cols = ['InterviewScore', 'SkillScore', 'PersonalityScore']
df_test_final = X_test.copy()
df_test_final['HiringDecision'] = y_test

summary_numeric_test = []

for col in numeric_cols:
    df_temp = df_test_final.copy()
    # 2. Lakukan binning hanya pada data test
    df_temp['Subset'] = pd.cut(df_temp[col], bins=3, labels=['Low', 'Medium', 'High'])

    # 3. Hitung metrik
    analysis = df_temp.groupby('Subset')['HiringDecision'].agg(['count', 'sum']).reset_index()
    analysis.columns = ['Subset', 'count', 'positives']
    analysis['positive_rate'] = (analysis['positives'] / analysis['count']).round(3)
    analysis.insert(0, 'Feature', col)

    summary_numeric_test.append(analysis)

df_final_table = pd.concat(summary_numeric_test, ignore_index=True)
display(df_final_table)

# Cek tipe modelnya
print(type(model))

# Cek apakah model ini punya parameter hasil tuning
print(model.get_params())

<class 'xgboost.sklearn.XGBClassifier'>
{'objective': 'binary:logistic', 'base_score': None, 'booster': None, 'callbacks': None, 'colsample_bylevel': None, 'colsample_bynode': None, 'colsample_bytree': None, 'device': None, 'early_stopping_rounds': None, 'enable_categorical': False, 'eval_metric': None, 'feature_types': None, 'feature_weights': None, 'gamma': 0.2, 'grow_policy': None, 'importance_type': None, 'interaction_constraints': None, 'learning_rate': 0.1, 'max_bin': None, 'max_cat_threshold': None, 'max_cat_to_onehot': None, 'max_delta_step': None, 'max_depth': 6, 'max_leaves': None, 'min_child_weight': None, 'missing': nan, 'monotone_constraints': None, 'multi_strategy': None, 'n_estimators': 300, 'n_jobs': None, 'num_parallel_tree': None, 'random_state': 42, 'reg_alpha': None, 'reg_lambda': 50, 'sampling_method': None, 'scale_pos_weight': None, 'subsample': None, 'tree_method': None, 'validate_parameters': None, 'verbosity': None}
In [67]:
import shap

# Pastikan model, X_train, dan X_test Anda sudah siap
explainer = shap.Explainer(model, X_train)
shap_values = explainer(X_test)

# Gunakan ini untuk visualisasi (BUKAN plots.beeswarm)
# plot_type="dot" akan membuat titik-titik berkerumun seperti di target
shap.summary_plot(shap_values, X_test, plot_type="dot")
In [68]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

# 1. Definisikan 15 fitur sesuai urutan data latih terbaru
all_feature_names = [
    'Age', 'EducationLevel', 'ExperienceYears', 'PreviousCompanies', 'DistanceFromCompany',
    'InterviewScore', 'SkillScore', 'PersonalityScore',
    'RecruitmentStrategy_External', 'RecruitmentStrategy_Internal', 'RecruitmentStrategy_Referral',
    'ExperienceLevel_Junior', 'ExperienceLevel_Medior', 'ExperienceLevel_Senior'
]

# 2. Ambil nilai importance dari model XGBoost
# Pastikan variabel 'model' adalah model yang baru saja Anda latih/tuning
model.fit(X_train, y_train)
importance = model.feature_importances_

# 3. Buat DataFrame untuk memudahkan pengurutan di grafik
feat_importance_df = pd.DataFrame({
    'Feature': all_feature_names,
    'Importance': importance
}).sort_values(by='Importance', ascending=True) # Urutkan dari yang terkecil ke terbesar agar grafik rapi

# 4. Visualisasi
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
plt.barh(feat_importance_df['Feature'], feat_importance_df['Importance'], color='#F0B29A')
plt.xlabel("XGBoost Feature Importance Score")
plt.ylabel("Features")
plt.title("Fitur yang Paling Berpengaruh dalam Prediksi Hiresights")
plt.grid(axis='x', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Data Set¶

In [69]:
import joblib
best_model = random_search_xgb.best_estimator_
# 1. Simpan Daftar Fitur (Pastikan urutan ini yang keluar di print)
feature_names = X_train.columns.tolist()
joblib.dump(feature_names, 'feature_names.joblib')

# 2. Simpan Scaler (Objek StandardScaler)
joblib.dump(scaler, 'scaler.joblib')

# 3. Simpan Model (Objek XGBoost)
joblib.dump(best_model, 'model_hiring.joblib')

# 4. Tambahkan ini di Notebook Anda
joblib.dump(X_train, 'X_train.joblib')

print("Semua file berhasil disimpan dengan benar!", feature_names)

Semua file berhasil disimpan dengan benar! ['Age', 'EducationLevel', 'ExperienceYears', 'PreviousCompanies', 'DistanceFromCompany', 'InterviewScore', 'SkillScore', 'PersonalityScore', 'RecruitmentStrategy_External', 'RecruitmentStrategy_Internal', 'RecruitmentStrategy_Referral', 'ExperienceLevel_Junior', 'ExperienceLevel_Medior', 'ExperienceLevel_Senior']
